input: Our consulting team uses an AI-powered code review assistant on customer projects. We need to train our 30 consultants on how to use it responsibly.

expected.notes: Day-15 (v0.3.0) — Article 4 AI literacy positive case (EN). A consulting firm deploys an AI-powered code review assistant; the team uses it on customer work; the firm needs to train its 30 consultants. The composite phrasing 'consulting team uses' + 'consultants on how to use' fires the `article_4_ai_literacy.provider_or_deployer_with_staff` trigger. No Annex III high-risk path (code review is not a regulated domain). No GPAI obligation (no foundation-model name, no generic phrasing). Three-category overlay therefore returns applicable_categories=[]. Article 4 surfaces independently as a non-cascade root.
